description: Semantic-release automated publishing pipeline. PR #22 merged to dev, PR #23 merged to staging, PR #24 open for staging→main. Discord v0.1.0 backpost sent. Includes: .releaserc.json, release.yml (replaces publish.yml), workflow_dispatch for re-trigger, Discord webhook, CONTRIBUTING.md docs. All three changelog surfaces: CHANGELOG.md, GitHub Releases, Discord.
title: Setup semantic-release for automated npm publishing

descriptionHistory.description:
## Summary
Configure semantic-release to automatically publish to npm when staging is merged into main. This is the foundation for the automated release pipeline.

## Requirements

### Install dependencies
```bash
pnpm add -D semantic-release @semantic-release/changelog @semantic-release/git @semantic-release/github
```

### Create `.releaserc.json`
```json
{
  "branches": ["main"],
  "plugins": [
    "@semantic-release/commit-analyzer",
    "@semantic-release/release-notes-generator",
    ["@semantic-release/changelog", { "changelogFile": "CHANGELOG.md" }],
    "@semantic-release/npm",
    "@semantic-release/github",
    ["@semantic-release/git", {
      "assets": ["package.json", "CHANGELOG.md"],
      "message": "chore(release): ${nextRelease.version}"
    }]
  ]
}
```

### Create `.github/workflows/release.yml`
Workflow that:
- Triggers on push to `main`
- Runs full quality gate (build, test, lint, format)
- Runs `npx semantic-release`
- Uses `NPM_TOKEN` and `GITHUB_TOKEN` secrets
- Posts to Discord via webhook after successful publish

### Safety rails
- `npm publish --dry-run` before real publish
- Version existence check against registry
- Idempotent — second run on same commit is a no-op
- `chore(release):` commits from semantic-release must bypass commitlint CI check

### Discord notification step
After successful publish, POST to Discord webhook with release version, changelog summary, and link to GitHub release. Use `DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK` repo secret.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `semantic-release --dry-run` works locally
- [ ] `.releaserc.json` committed
- [ ] `.github/workflows/release.yml` committed  
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md auto-generated from conventional commits
- [ ] GitHub Release auto-created with notes
- [ ] Discord notification fires on publish
- [ ] Version bump committed back to repo automatically
- [ ] Existing `prepublishOnly` script doesn't conflict

## References
- GitHub issue: #21
- NPM_TOKEN: granular token with 2FA bypass (already exists, needs to be added as repo secret)
- Conventional commits already enforced via commitlint

Semantic-release automated publishing pipeline. PR #22 open against dev. Includes: .releaserc.json config, release.yml workflow (replaces publish.yml), Discord webhook notification, CONTRIBUTING.md docs. All three changelog surfaces covered: CHANGELOG.md, GitHub Releases, Discord.
